case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. IVONNE BERMUNDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: THOMPSON, BYRON CLAYTON SUBSTITUTED FOR WILLIAMS, CARL LOUIS AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, IVONNE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED APR-25-2003, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, IVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 655 PACIFIC AVE. #301, S.F. CA. 94133, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, IVONNE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, IVONNE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, IVONNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
